name: io.github.mechreaper007x/clipacanvas
description: Render HTML/CSS/JS to MP4 via Chromium + FFmpeg. CSS, WAAPI, SVG, canvas support. Returns base64.

environmentVariables.name: CLIPACANVAS_FFMPEG_EXE
environmentVariables.description: Path to FFmpeg executable (auto-detected if not set)

environmentVariables.name: CLIPACANVAS_BROWSERS_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to Playwright browsers directory (auto-detected if not set)
